title: SEC4: is_ascii_hexdigit in test does not enforce lowercase
description: tests/wasm.rs lines 60-62 and 192-194: both assertions use is_ascii_hexdigit() or a manual range check, with assertion messages claiming 'must be lowercase hex'. is_ascii_hexdigit() accepts A-F as well as a-f, so the predicate does not actually enforce lowercase. The correct predicate is matches!(c, '0'..='9' | 'a'..='f'). Test Set C (line 192-194) already uses the correct range check, but Test Set A (line 60-62) uses is_ascii_hexdigit(). A maintainer reading both will not notice the inconsistency and may trust the weaker assertion. Fix: replace is_ascii_hexdigit() in line 61 with matches!(c, '0'..='9' | 'a'..='f') to match the predicate in test_pub_id_derivation and correctly enforce lowercase.
